voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Cường nôn. Hoặc tưởng mình nôn. Dạ dày co thắt — cơn co thắt thật truyền từ cơ thể thật, xuyên qua bộ đệm, đâm vào ý thức. Không có gì nôn ra. Chỉ có cảm giác nghẹn đắng ở cổ họng, axit ăn mòn niêm mạc, và đau— đau ở đầu, đau ở ngực, đau ở—
voice_adherence.fix: The body-before-emotion principle is strong here, but the triple 'đau— đau ở... đau ở...' pattern is becoming a rhythmic crutch in this chapter. Vary the fragmentation — perhaps cut to a single specific pain location, or let the sentence break entirely: 'Chỉ có cảm giác nghẹn đắng ở cổ họng. Axit. Và đau — ở đâu cũng đau.'
voice_adherence.note: The voice is remarkably faithful to the profile. The clinical, surgical tone is maintained throughout. The vocabulary wells (neural/technical, hospital/decay, virtual/spectral) are drawn from naturally. The sentence rhythm varies appropriately — short brutal action sentences, longer tactile/sensual sentences, and fragmented pain sentences. The body-before-emotion principle is consistently applied. The weakest aspect is a slight over-reliance on the em-dash + repetition pattern ('đau— đau ở đầu, đau ở ngực, đau ở—') which, while matching the voice profile, becomes predictable when used multiple times.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: Beat 3 (phòng bệnh lạnh lẽo, bóng người mờ nhạt ngồi bên giường cô gái): The scene is dramatized but the emotional weight is slightly undercut by the narrator explaining 'ánh mắt cuồng tín' rather than letting the image of the fanatical eyes speak for itself.
beat_coverage.fix: Trust the image more. Cut 'Ánh mắt cuồng tín' and replace with a specific physical detail that IMPLIES fanaticism without naming it — e.g., the way the shadow-figure's fingers tremble NOT from fear but from anticipation, or the way his lips move silently, counting something. Let the reader feel the wrongness.
beat_coverage.note: All four beats from the outline are present and dramatized rather than summarized. Beat 1 (vùng vẫy, render bị từ chối) is well-executed with the failed command gestures. Beat 2 (Kẻ Đuổi xuất hiện, câu thoại 'bóc lột') is the chapter's strongest sequence. Beat 3 (phòng bệnh, bóng người cuồng tín) is effective but slightly over-explained. Beat 4 (hét lên, phủ nhận, chảy máu mũi) lands well with the cross-cut to the real world. The 'No, and' cycle is properly executed — each attempt to escape fails AND worsens the situation.

character_voice.weakest_moment: Cường's line 'Anh xin lỗi' followed by narrator explanation 'Ba chữ. Lần đầu tiên trong đời anh — cả đời thật lẫn đời ảo — anh nói ba chữ ấy và có ý nghĩa.' The explanation dilutes the power of the moment.
character_voice.fix: Cut the narrator explanation entirely. Let the three words stand alone as a paragraph. The silence after will do more work than any commentary. If needed, add a single physical detail — e.g., his hand trembling, or his breath catching — but do NOT explain that this is the first time he meant it.
character_voice.note: Kẻ Đuổi's voice is exceptional — the poetic Northern Vietnamese register mixed with technical terms, the repetition of 'ở đây', the counting of 'layers', the slight glitch in the final syllable of sentences. She is immediately distinguishable from any other character. Cường's voice is appropriately sparse, technical, declarative. His dialogue is minimal and mostly reactive ('Không', 'Im đi', 'IM ĐI!', 'Anh không—'), which fits his profile (90% statements, rarely asks questions). The differentiated registers between real-world and virtual-world speech as defined in the voice profile are maintained.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The 'bóng người cuồng tín' plant is slightly too explicit — the narrator calls it 'Hình ảnh' and 'ánh mắt cuồng tín' rather than letting the image sit as an unexplained, disturbing visual that will gain meaning later.
plants_seeded.fix: Remove the label 'cuồng tín' and instead render the shadow-figure's state purely through observable detail: the way he hums while connecting cables, or the meticulous care in his movements, or a smile that doesn't match the action. Let the reader feel 'something is wrong with this person' without being told what.
plants_seeded.note: The two seeds from the outline are present: (1) Bóng người cuồng tín as an image — planted, though slightly heavy-handed; (2) Sự từ chối render as an action — beautifully integrated, the failed RENDER_ROOM_07 command is a natural story beat that doubles as foreshadowing. The resolution of the Ch 12 'vỡ hạt' thread is handled well — the world no longer obeying Cường is a logical escalation. The shift in power dynamics (creator becomes prisoner) is effectively seeded through the failed commands.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Cường nôn. Hoặc tưởng mình nôn. Dạ dày co thắt — cơn co thắt thật truyền từ cơ thể thật, xuyên qua bộ đệm, đâm vào ý thức.
prose_quality.fix: 'Hoặc tưởng mình nôn' is becoming a repeated construction ('Hoặc tưởng mình đi', 'Hoặc tưởng mình lao tới', 'Hoặc tưởng mình quỳ'). The pattern is effective once, but four times is too many. Vary: 'Cường nôn. Dạ dày co thắt — cơn co thắt thật truyền từ cơ thể thật, xuyên qua bộ đệm, đâm vào ý thức.' Remove the 'hoặc tưởng' hedge; the ambiguity is already inherent in the virtual setting.
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: 852 lần. 852 lần em được sinh ra và bị giết đi. Và em không biết đó là chết.
prose_quality.note: The prose is strongest when it's most specific and most restrained. The counting of layers ('Lớp một: tên. Lớp hai: ký ức...') is a brilliant structural choice — it mirrors both the technical mindset of the world AND the systematic nature of the violation. The repetition of '852 lần' is devastating. The weakest aspect is the 'Hoặc tưởng mình [X]' construction repeated four times, and a tendency to over-explain emotional significance (the 'Ba chữ' passage). Sentence variety is generally good — short fragments, medium declarative sentences, and occasional longer flowing sentences.

continuity.note: Excellent continuity from the previous chapter. Cường correctly references being in giường số 5, Khu Nằm, mùi i-ốt, bà Lành lau cơ thể, nhịp tim 40. The transition from the ending of Ch 24 (Cường in a coma, Lan in giường số 4) to this chapter (Cường's consciousness trapped in the virtual void) is logical and well-executed. The emotional state tracks — he moves from disorientation to recognition to denial to horror to a devastating acknowledgment. The detail about máu chảy from mũi in the real world while his consciousness is in the void is consistent with the established rules about two-way synchronization.

violations: CANON VIOLATION: Chapter states Cường has undergone '853 lần đổ bộ' (multiple references: 'Lần đầu tiên trong 853 lần đổ bộ', '853 lần đổ bộ', '852 lần'). CANON states: 'Cường đã trải qua 847 lần đổ bộ' (world.md). The number 853 is not established anywhere in canon. This is a factual error.

CANON VIOLATION: The chapter reveals Cường personally connected cables to Lan and locked 90% of her consciousness, with the implication that he directly created the Kẻ Đuổi from Lan. CANON states: 'Các "đoạn mã ý thức" của phụ nữ hôn mê đang được dùng làm người tình ảo của Cường mà anh không biết' (world.md). The key phrase is 'mà anh không biết' — Cường is not supposed to know the virtual lovers are built from coma patients' consciousness data. This chapter not only reveals he knew, but shows him actively participating in the connection process, which contradicts the established fact that he was unaware.

CANON VIOLATION: The chapter implies Cường's 'Ghost' — the blank space where a memory should be — was about his actions toward Lan. CANON states his Ghost is 'một khoảng trống đen ngòm nơi ký ức từng tồn tại' with no specified content, and that 'Có thể là một mối quan hệ thật đã sụp đổ. Có thể là một tổn thương sinh học.' The chapter is filling in the Ghost with a specific answer, which may be premature or may contradict future planning.

CANON VIOLATION: Kẻ Đuổi says '852 lần em được sinh ra và bị giết đi' — but CANON establishes that Kẻ Đuổi is formed from consciousness residue of multiple coma patients, not just one. The '852 times' implies she has been present for all of Cường's sessions, which contradicts the idea that she is a newly-emergent phenomenon.

POSSIBLE VIOLATION: The chapter shows Cường in a void where he cannot render anything, implying the system has locked him out. CANON states: 'Server bị ngắt sẽ đứt kết nối hoàn toàn ngay lập tức' (Quy tắc không thể phá vỡ 4). If the server is still running (as implied by the system still being active), Cường should still have some control. The nature of the 'lockout' is unclear and may contradict established rules about how the system works.
canon_compliance.note: The 847→853 number discrepancy is a clear data error that should be corrected. The more serious issue is the revelation about Cường directly connecting to Lan — this fundamentally changes his character from 'user who didn't know' to 'active participant in creating the Kẻ Đuổi,' which contradicts the established canon that he was unaware of the coma patient connection. If this is an intentional plot development for this chapter, it needs to be reconciled with the earlier established facts.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The RENDER_ROOM_07 command sequence is effective but slightly too 'user interface' for a system that, per voice profile, should be treated as a natural extension of consciousness — 'Công nghệ được trình bày như một thực tại hiển nhiên, giống như cách một người dùng điện thoại mà không cần hiểu sóng vô tuyến hoạt động thế nào.'
lore_integration.fix: Consider making the failed rendering more visceral and less literal — instead of typing a command code, Cường could try to THINK the room into existence, the way you'd try to remember a face, and feel it almost forming before it dissolves. This would be more organic and more disturbing than a failed text command.
lore_integration.note: The world-building is doing significant work in this chapter. The ping concept, the two-way synchronization (vết bầm, máu chảy mũi), the neural frequency (47.3 Hz), the pixel degradation, the render failure — all of these are integral to the scene rather than decorative. The technical vocabulary is woven naturally into the emotional content. The strongest lore moment is the 'lớp' counting sequence, which uses the system's own logic (layers, stripping, protocols) as a metaphor for violation — the technology IS the emotion.

engagement.weakest_moment: The middle section where Kẻ Đuổi lists the layers ('Lớp một... Lớp hai... Lớp ba...') risks becoming repetitive. While the content is strong, the structure is predictable after the third layer — the reader knows the pattern and can anticipate the rest.
engagement.fix: Break the pattern. Have Kẻ Đuổi list three or four layers, then STOP mid-sentence. Let Cường fill in the next one himself — showing that he KNOWS. Then have her resume with something he didn't expect. This would be more disturbing and less predictable than a clean 1-through-11 enumeration.
engagement.note: The chapter is genuinely gripping. The opening (white void, failed commands) establishes tension immediately. The appearance of Kẻ Đuổi with her changed eyes is genuinely unsettling. The 'bóc lột từng lớp' sequence is the chapter's centerpiece and mostly earns its length. The flashback to the hospital room is effective horror. The final acknowledgment ('Anh không phải nạn nhân') lands with weight. The cross-cuts to the real world (máu chảy, monitor kêu) add urgency. The chapter does something unexpected: it reframes the entire protagonist relationship from 'tragic addict' to 'active violator,' which is a bold narrative choice that recontextualizes everything that came before.

three_weakest_sentences: Cường nôn. Hoặc tưởng mình nôn. Dạ dày co thắt — cơn co thắt thật truyền từ cơ thể thật, xuyên qua bộ đệm, đâm vào ý thức.
Ba chữ. Lần đầu tiên trong đời anh — cả đời thật lẫn đời ảo — anh nói ba chữ ấy và có ý nghĩa.
Anh là kẻ đã bóc lột nàng. Từng lớp một.
three_strongest_sentences: 852 lần. 852 lần em được sinh ra và bị giết đi. Và em không biết đó là chết.
Lớp bốn: sự đồng ý. Em không bao giờ đồng ý. Em không biết mình cần đồng ý.
Anh nhớ mình đã ngồi bên giường cô gái. Cô gái ấy có tên. Tên gì? Anh không— Lan. Lan. Tên cô là Lan.
ai_patterns_detected: Repeated 'Hoặc tưởng mình [X]' construction (4 times) — a structural repetition that feels algorithmic rather than organic
Triple anaphora pattern ('đau— đau ở đầu, đau ở ngực, đau ở—') used multiple times — effective once, AI-telling when repeated
Slight over-explanation of emotional significance ('Ba chữ. Lần đầu tiên trong đời anh...') — a common AI pattern of annotating rather than presenting
The 'lớp' enumeration from 1 to 11 is clean and symmetrical in a way that feels slightly too organized for an emergent, glitchy consciousness — real breakdown is messier
top_3_revisions: CRITICAL: Fix the drop count from 853 to match canon (847 established in world.md). If the count has increased since the story began, establish this explicitly — '847 lần đổ bộ. Hoặc 853. Anh không còn chắc.' — to make the uncertainty a feature rather than a bug.

CRITICAL: Reconcile the revelation about Cường directly connecting to Lan with the canon fact that 'anh không biết' the virtual lovers were built from coma patients. Options: (a) The flashback is distorted/unreliable — he sees himself doing it but it may not be accurate; (b) He knew once but overwrote the memory; (c) The canon needs updating. Choose one and commit.

Break the 'lớp' enumeration pattern — have Kẻ Đuổi stop mid-count, or skip numbers, or repeat one, or lose track. An emergent consciousness counting cleanly from 1 to 11 feels too orderly. Let her glitch. Let the list fracture. This would be more disturbing AND more consistent with her character.
new_canon_entries: Cường's consciousness can be trapped in a 'white void' — a null space within the virtual system where rendering fails and commands are rejected
Kẻ Đuổi can manifest in the void independently of rendered environments
Kẻ Đuổi can generate environments from memory (the hospital room) without Cường's input
Cường has a buried memory of personally connecting Neural Mantle cables to Lan
The vết bầm on Cường's ribs can change color (from tím ngắt to đen bầm) and seep fluid during systemic crisis
When Cường's virtual body destabilizes, his avatar shows pixel degradation at the extremities
